message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Eurobarometer 58.2 (Nov–Dec 2002)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12268","justification":"Includes political attitudes, trust in institutions and international/European organizations. Covers EU member states including Denmark, Germany, Spain, France, Ireland, Italy, Portugal, United Kingdom. Fieldwork in 2002 (within 2000s) and focused on political behaviour and attitudes at European and international level."},{"title":"Eurobarometer 62.0 (Oct–Nov 2004)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12293","justification":"Surveys political attitudes, institutional trust, views on EU and international issues. Conducted 2004 across EU-25 including Denmark, Germany, Spain, France, Ireland, Italy, Portugal, United Kingdom, Estonia, Hungary, Slovenia. Directly relevant to political behaviour/attitudes and international organizations in the 2000s."},{"title":"Eurobarometer 63.4 (May–Jun 2005)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12301","justification":"Focuses on political attitudes, EU constitutional issues, and opinions on European/international politics. Fieldwork 2005 in EU-25 including all requested countries (Denmark, Germany, Spain, France, Ireland, Italy, Portugal, UK, Estonia, Hungary, Slovenia). Contains variables on political behaviour and views toward supranational institutions."},{"title":"Eurobarometer 66.1 (Sep–Oct 2006)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12316","justification":"General and trend Eurobarometer with extensive modules on political attitudes, trust in EU institutions and international policy issues. Conducted 2006 in EU-25/27 countries including all specified states. Useful for analysing cross‑national political behaviour and orientations toward international organizations in the 2000s."},{"title":"Eurobarometer 67.1 (Feb–Mar 2007)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12319","justification":"Contains indicators of political interest, party support, electoral behaviour, and trust in EU and other institutions. Fieldwork 2007 across EU including Denmark, Germany, Spain, France, Ireland, Italy, Portugal, UK, Estonia, Hungary, Slovenia, enabling comparative study of political attitudes and international politics."},{"title":"European Election Study 2004 – Voter Study, EU‑25","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12269","justification":"Specifically targets political behaviour and attitudes related to the 2004 European Parliament elections, with items on EU integration and institutions. Covers EU‑25 member states including Denmark, Germany, Spain, France, Ireland, Italy, Portugal, UK, Estonia, Hungary, Slovenia. Collected mid‑2000s, directly matching political behaviour domain."},{"title":"European Election Study 2009 – Voter Study, EU‑27","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10073","justification":"Focus on voting behaviour, party choice, political attitudes, and views on EU and European Parliament. Fieldwork 2009 in EU‑27 including all requested countries. Strongly suited to analysing mass political behaviour and attitudes in an international/European context in the late 2000s."},{"title":"ISSP 2003 – National Identity II (ZA3910)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.3910","justification":"International Social Survey Programme module on national identity with many items on attitudes toward other countries, supranational organizations (e.g., EU, UN), and international politics. Conducted 2003; Denmark, Germany, Spain, France, Great Britain, Ireland, Italy, Portugal, and others participate, enabling cross‑national analysis of political attitudes and international orientation."},{"title":"ISSP 2004 – Citizenship (ZA3950)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.3950","justification":"Covers political participation, civic engagement, trust in institutions, rights and duties of citizens, and some items relating to transnational political engagement. Conducted 2004 in multiple European countries including Germany, Great Britain, Hungary, Ireland, Italy, Portugal, Spain, allowing study of political behaviour and attitudes in the 2000s."},{"title":"ISSP 2006 – Role of Government IV (ZA4700)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4700","justification":"Module examines attitudes toward government responsibilities, public spending, and trust in political institutions; includes questions on international issues such as peacekeeping and global responsibilities of governments. Fieldwork 2006 with participating countries including Denmark, Germany, Spain, France, Great Britain, Ireland, Italy, Portugal, Hungary, providing cross‑national data on political attitudes and views about international roles of states."}]}
